title: Shingeki no Craft | Attack on Titan
description:
Titan Shifters, ODM, Cannons, Pure Titans, Thunder Spears, Modified Villages, Firearms, Royal Blood, Quests and more!

Made using only Command Blocks, Minecraft Vanilla!
body:
Throughout this post, you'll find public information documenting the mechanisms and operation of the various gadgets and mobs included in this project. Make sure to install the required resource pack for this datapack to work.

But, what is a datapack? Isn't it the same as a mod?
A datapack is built using Minecraft's built-in features. I take a bunch of command blocks and convert them into actual files to do crazy stuff. They have more limitations than regular mods, but they are easier to install and use once you get started.

Can I use this in a server?
Yes, absolutely.

~Fanfo

IMPORTANT: Required Resource Pack

To make the most out of Shingeki no Craft, you must install the required resource pack. This pack provides new sprites, audio, and textures that are essential to the experience.

Download the Resource Pack here

Shingeki no Craft Music (Recommended)

Support this project on Patreon!

Link to Discord Server!

Get Started:

Visit the Official Site and Wiki of Shingeki no Craft for more info!

Check out the advancements; they'll guide you through the crafting progression.

Advancements!

Configuration:

Use /function snc:api/config to customize the game to your liking!

Commands and Content Creators:

Use any /function snc:api/... command to test the datapack!
You can get all the items with: /function snc:api/all_items
